items.name: Digital-Twin-Framework-for-Industrial-Asset-Prognostics

By forecasting failures before they occur, the system enables proactive maintenance scheduling, reducing downtime, costs, and operational risks.

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for assessing climate change impacts on environmental and socio-economic factors. This project provides synthetic data generation, multiple modeling approaches, and interactive visualizations for climate impact analysis.

items.name: Liumon
items.description: Liumon is an experimental quantitative research framework for alpha factor discovery, machine learning ranking models, and systematic trading research.

items.description: An intelligent system that leverages Machine Learning, Reinforcement Learning, and Computer Vision to analyze tourism data, optimize travel experiences, and provide smart recommendations. Built using PyTorch, Stable-Baselines3, and modern AI frameworks, with a focus on scalability and real-time insights.

items.name: A-Decentralized-Framework-for-AI-based-Resource-Allocation-in-Open-RAN
items.description: A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.

items.description: A data-driven personal finance analytics system that calculates income tax liability under the Indian tax framework, assesses financial health using key indicators, and predicts financial stress levels with explainable insights. Built as an educational decision-support tool using Python, FastAPI, and machine learning techniques.

items.name: pyBIA
items.description: Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.

items.name: AI
items.description: 🤖 Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.

items.name: AI2026
items.description: An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

items.name: Real-Time-Particle-Event-Trigger-System-Simulation-
items.description: A simulation framework evaluating the performance of rule-based, statistical, and ML (Machine Learning) trigger systems for real-time filtering of physics data streams.

items.name: fucking-awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars⭐ and forks🍴

items.name: SexpOps
items.description: SexpOps is a comprehensive machine learning operator library implemented in pure Common Lisp. It provides a complete tensor computation framework with automatic differentiation capabilities, making it suitable for building and training neural networks from scratch.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: ML-QSPR-Weighted-Sombor
items.description: A comparative machine learning framework for predicting physicochemical properties using 28 novel Weighted Sombor Indices.

items.name: voxair
items.description: Open framework for structured annotation of air traffic communication, improving the reliability of machine learning systems in aviation.

items.name: ml_in_c
items.description: A growing collection of bare-metal machine learning experiments. Building everything from single-weight optimizers to full C-based AI frameworks without external libraries

items.name: Machine-Learning-Final-Project
items.description: Builds a market risk framework for U.S. Treasury yields using Factor Analysis to extract latent drivers, Agglomerative Clustering for regime detection, and Isolation Forest for tail events; explains ~70% of covariance.

items.name: ACAM
items.description: An AI-driven framework for automated cryptanalysis. ACAM dynamically evaluates and selects the most efficient algorithms to analyze and break encryption schemes using machine learning models.

items.name: ML-MINIAOD-Processing
items.description: This repository contains a set of CMSSW modules and helper scripts designed to preprocess particle physics data (specifically from MINIAOD files) into flat `TTree` ROOT files. The resulting files are optimized for subsequent analysis, particularly for training machine learning models. The framework is configured to handle AK15 jets with condor

items.name: Generative-Motion-Planner
items.description: A framework for motion planning using generative machine learning methods

items.name: learnify
items.description: A freelance from-scratch Python library project for machine learning and deep learning with visualizations, built using only raw Python and NumPy without external ML frameworks.

items.name: social-twins
items.description: A Machine Learning framework for discovering and characterizing scenarios from trajectory datasets into different interaction types by combining state-of-the-art trajectory forecasting and embedding quantization techniques.

items.name: SDN-SmartGuard-ML
items.description: Framework de Rede Definida por Software (SDN) com monitoramento inteligente via Machine Learning (Isolation Forest). Automatização de fluxos OpenFlow para detecção de anomalias e redução de custos em infraestruturas de TIC utilizando Ryu Controller e Mininet.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: PEDIATRIC-TRAJECTORY-MODEL
items.description: A machine learning framework for modeling pediatric health trajectories using longitudinal clinical data. The project leverages LSTM-based deep learning to simulate disease progression, stratify risk levels, and generate predictive insights for pediatric patient outcomes.

items.name: Banking_Fd
items.description: Transaction data is analyzed to identify abnormal patterns linked to fraudulent activity.  Machine learning models are used to accurately classify transactions and adapt to new fraud patterns.  The framework supports early detection and improves the security and reliability of financial transactions.

items.name: DEEPHEALTHNET-ADOLESCENT-OBESITY-PREDICTION-SYSTEM-BASED-ON-A-DEEP-LEARNING-FRAMEWORK
items.description: Adolescent Obesity Prediction System is a machine learning-based web application built with Django. It analyzes health, lifestyle, and dietary factors to predict obesity risk in adolescents, enabling early detection and promoting better health decisions through accurate insights.

items.name: A-Hybrid-GeoAI-and-Generative-AI-Framework-for-Sustainable-Pluvial-Flood-Susceptibility
items.description: Hybrid GeoAI and Generative AI system for pluvial flood susceptibility prediction and sustainable decision support using machine learning!

items.name: quantum-tensor-networks-circuits
items.description: Quantum Tensor Networks Circuits is a modular framework for building and benchmarking variational quantum circuits based on tensor networks. The framework allows for various encoding methods and ansatz topologies, thus enabling the comparison of their precision and expressibility in quantum machine learning applications.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: Pharmacokinetic-Interaction-Analysis
items.description: An integrated research framework for quantifying drug-drug interactions using Fractional Differential Equations (FDE) and predicting clinical outcomes through machine learning. Features a production-ready analytical engine and exploratory data visualizations of FDA-documented interactions

items.name: PondRecharge
items.description: Computational framework for pond-based groundwater recharge estimation using multi-source geospatial data and machine learning models (GB, XGBoost, Random Forest) in the Ramganga Basin, India. Includes data processing workflows, model implementation, and recharge prediction outputs.

items.name: Car-Price-Prediction
items.description: This project is a Machine Learning-based web application that predicts the price of a car based on various features such as brand, year, fuel type, and more. The model is trained using a dataset of used cars and deployed using a Flask web framework to provide real-time predictions through a user-friendly interface.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: GML-EMT
items.description: A semi-supervised medical image classification framework based on gradual machine learning

items.name: MLDL_Lab
items.description: A hands-on laboratory repository for practicing Machine Learning & Deep Learning concepts using Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and popular ML/DL frameworks.

items.name: Global-Superpower-and-Geopolitical-Risk-Nexus
items.description: The Global Superpower and Geopolitical Risk Nexus is an advanced predictive analytics and machine learning framework designed to quantify, model, and forecast geopolitical risks arising from the strategic competition between global superpowers (e.g., the United States, China, the European Union, and Russia).

items.name: hybrid-gnn-fraud-intel
items.description: A real-time, hybrid Graph Neural Network (GNN) and machine learning framework to detect organized fraud rings and synthetic identities in mobile money ecosystems. Features a dynamic transaction graph, PyTorch Geometric, Neo4j, and a FastAPI backend

items.name: MediPredict-A-Unified-AI-Framework-for-Early-Diagnosis-of-Cardio-Pulmonary-and-Neuro-Disorders
items.description: It is an intelligent web-based disease prediction system designed to assist healthcare professionals and patients in identifying potential Heart, Lung, and Brain disorders using machine learning models.It provides an easy to use interface where users can input key health parameters, and the system predicts the disease occurrence with high accuracy.

items.name: Quantum_Machine_Learning
items.description: Modular PennyLane-based quantum machine learning framework with reusable implementations of VQC and quantum kernel classifiers.

items.name: XAIFramework
items.description: Code for "Explainable machine learning framework for biomarker discovery by combining biological age and frailty prediction"

items.name: fansipan-afs
items.description: A framework for encapsulating and representing detection results and metadata into interoperable records about analytics subjects that are detected by machine learning pipelines in the edge

items.name: british-airways-data-science
items.description: 🔥 Engineered a machine learning pipeline achieving 85% accuracy in predicting customer booking behavior, and a scalable demand forecasting framework supporting capacity planning across 1,500+ daily premium lounge departures at Heathrow Terminal 3.

items.name: ModelingToolkit.jl
items.description: An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

items.name: modular-bootstrap
items.description: Machine-learning-style optimization framework to find candidate two-dimensional conformal field theory partition functions

items.name: Ecommerce-AI-Communication-Framework
items.description: Hybrid AI framework for intelligent customer communication management in e-commerce systems. The project combines natural language processing, predictive machine learning models, and explainable AI techniques to analyze customer interactions, predict escalation or churn risks, and optimize communication strategies for improved customer experience.

items.name: NorthSeaSR_Estimation
items.description: A comparative framework for sex ratio estimation in North Sea fish using classical statistics, machine learning, and deep learning.

items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: Youtube-data-analysis-and-prediction-of-views-and-categories
items.description: Machine learning , python, css, html and js were used in this project. Flask framework also used. This project is develop to analyse the youtube data and predict the views and categories of our videos and compare our channels  videos with another channels.

items.name: ML-internship
items.description: Airline delay  prediction using machine learning and deep learning . Here i predict the airline delay process and why it occurs and when it occurs after finding the problem i give the solution.By using frondend and backend( python ) using flask frameworks.

items.name: RECLAIM
items.description: RECLAIM (Reservoir Estimation of Capacity Loss using AI-based Methods) is a globally scalable machine learning framework to predict absolute sedimentation rates using observed records and multi-decadal Earth observations from satellite data.

items.name: leo-cdp-framework
items.description: LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing — powered by big data and machine learning.

items.name: graphstorm
items.description: Enterprise graph machine learning framework for billion-scale graphs for ML scientists and data scientists.

items.name: ryzen-ai-documentation
items.description: Onboarding documentation source for the AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform.   The AMD Ryzen™ AI Software Platform enables developers to take pretrained machine learning models in popular frameworks and run them on laptops powered by AMD Ryzen™ AI technology.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: fair-post-processing
items.description: A modular Python framework for fairness-aware post-processing in machine learning.  The library takes classifier probabilities and learns optimal decision thresholds  by optimizing multiple fairness and performance metrics, enabling multi-objective  selection via methods such as TOPSIS and Zenith.

items.name: RAPHT
items.description: A heterogeneous machine learning framework for APT threat attribution, specifically tailored for RAT-APT relationships.

items.name: ML-From-Scratch
items.description: End-to-end Machine Learning algorithms implemented from scratch using only Python and NumPy. Focused on understanding the underlying mathematics and linear algebra without high-level frameworks.

items.description: This repository contains the implementation of MFCC-GNB XtractNet, a novel hybrid machine learning framework for detecting deepfake and synthetic voice recordings

items.name: sagemaker-distribution
items.description: A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

items.name: vibrolearn
items.description: A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.

items.name: Burn-severity-classification-via-texture-analysis-and-supervised-learning
items.description: This repository contains the implementation of an automated framework for burn severity classification based on medical image analysis, texture feature extraction, and supervised machine learning methods. The proposed approach focuses on interpretable feature-based modeling and includes the full pipeline from image preprocessing to classification.

items.name: MLOps-Production-Pipeline-E2E
items.description: This repository demonstrates a complete, production-grade Machine Learning lifecycle. Inspired by the 'Made With ML' framework, this project goes beyond model training to implement robust data engineering, automated testing, and CI/CD deployment.
